title: cyanocephalus rugosus
intro: Cyanocephalus rugosus, also known as the "blue-headed" or "blue-spotted" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyanocephalus rugosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed for therapeutic purposes.
